role_summary: Validates the end-to-end execution of the core analysis pipeline, ensuring correct handling of empty directories, successful file processing, and proper generation of output artifacts.
extracted_finding: The system implements a core analysis pipeline that scans project directories for valid files, applying a minimum content length filter to skip irrelevant files. It tracks execution status (e.g., 'halted' for empty inputs, 'success' for valid processing) and generates a consolidated summary. Successful execution produces structured documentation artifacts including extracted notes per file, along with markdown files mapping domain concepts, system intent, and user personas. All outputs are organized under a hidden '.wikifi' workspace directory.
